heroHeading: Professional Accounting Services You Can Trust
heroSubheading: Angie Barton Professional Services offers expert accounting, bookkeeping, and tax preparation for individuals and businesses — with the personal attention you deserve.

aboutTeaserText: With years of experience serving individuals and businesses in our community, Angie brings professional expertise and a personal touch to every client relationship.
